allow: Bash(node -e " const readline = require\('readline'\); const lines = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\).trim\(\).split\('\\n'\); lines.slice\(-20\).forEach\(line => { try { const obj = JSON.parse\(line\); const role = obj.role || ''; let content = obj.content || ''; if \(Array.isArray\(content\)\) { content.forEach\(c => { if \(c && c.type === 'text'\) console.log\(role.toUpperCase\(\) + ':', c.text.substring\(0,400\)\); }\); } else if \(typeof content === 'string'\) { console.log\(role.toUpperCase\(\) + ':', content.substring\(0,400\)\); } } catch\(e\) {} }\); ")
